name: APECOFT ON DE ROCK
bio: band with a warm sound who tells stories through memories. Every song feels like opening an old photo album, each page full of stories.

name: WAVE
bio: A producer and vocalist in love with the sound of the city at night. His work feels like walking down rain-soaked streets under neon lights.

name: SORA
bio: A songwriter who believes words weigh less than air but leave marks deeper than stone. Her songs are poems you can sing.

name: LUNA BYTE
tagline: Moonlit signals from a pixel heart
bio: A digital-era vocalist who turns late-night code, arcade lights, and fragile feelings into glowing synth-pop stories.
